title: Harvest Festival Legacy
body:
# Harvest Festival 1.12.2 port

## Do back up your world for each update!

## What this project does:

*   Fixing bugs.

## What this project does NOT do:

*   Adding new features or missing features (marriage, festivals, etc.) That means it will never leave the BETA stage.
*   Porting this mod to a newer version.

CraftTweaker guide: [https://web.archive.org/web/20210118201851/http://minetweaker3.powerofbytes.com/wiki/Mods:Harvest\_Festival\_Support](https://web.archive.org/web/20210118201851/http://minetweaker3.powerofbytes.com/wiki/Mods:Harvest_Festival_Support)

> Harvest Festival is a mod heavily inspired by the Harvest Moon series of games. Adding crops and animals, that need to be cared for in order to make the most out of them. Village and relationship building with the introduction of new NPCs and the builder, who will help you build a town for the people, as well as guide you on your way. Seasons that affect day length and daily weather are also included. Cook dishes with crops that you have harvested or gather minerals in the Mine!
